summary: Make 'list --all' pagination work for Ticketmaster's HAL envelope: extractPaginatedItems now recurses into _embedded.<collection> (helpers.go), and the 4 list commands pass limitParam='size' so the paginator sends a full page size and detects short final pages.
reason: Ticketmaster Discovery v2 returns collections under _embedded.events (HAL/HATEOAS). v4.28.0's generated paginator only looked for top-level arrays so 'events list --all' returned []; and with an empty limitParam it kept a 100-item internal page size, treating Ticketmaster's 20-item default page as a short final page and stopping after page 0. The _embedded fix is in the generator template (upstreamed); the size-param mapping is applied per-command here until the generator detects the page-size param.
validated_outcome: events list --all --keyword music --city Seattle now fetches 665 items across 34 pages (was 20/1 page); events list --all --keyword Adele returns items (was []).
